prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns for large-cap healthcare stocks like Medtronic (MDT), I assume an annualized volatility of approximately 25%. Over 20 days, this translates to a standard deviation of about 2.3%. The point estimate assumes slight positive drift typical of established healthcare companies. Confidence intervals are constructed using log-normal distribution assumptions with increasing width for higher confidence levels.
